query:
-- Find cancelled agents whose isActive is still 1 or portalStatus is not cancelled
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.isActive, u.portalStatus, acp.agentStatus
FROM users u
JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE acp.agentStatus = 'cancelled'
  AND (u.isActive = 1 OR u.portalStatus != 'cancelled')
ORDER BY u.name;
